{{Short description|National association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|United States Virgin Islands women's national football team}}
{{Use mdy dates|date=June 2021}}
{{Infobox National football team
| Name                = U.S. Virgin Islands
| Badge               = 
| Badge_size          = 250px
| Nickname            = ''The Dashing Eagles''
| Association         = [[U.S. Virgin Islands Soccer Federation]] (USVISF)
| Confederation       = {{nowrap|[[CONCACAF]] (North America)}}
| Sub-confederation   = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Coach               = [[Terrence Jones (football manager)|Terrence Jones]]
| Captain             = [[Joshua Ramos]]
| Most caps           = [[Jett Blaschka]] (26)
| Top scorer          = [[Jamie Browne]] & [[J.C. Mack]] (3)
| Home Stadium        = [[Bethlehem Soccer Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme      = VIR
| FIFA Rank           = {{nowrap|{{FIFA World Rankings|VIR|mdy=y}}}}
| FIFA max            = 149
| FIFA max date       = July 2011
| FIFA min            = 208
| FIFA min date       = March 2022, November 2023
| Elo Rank            = {{World Football Elo Ratings|US Virgin Islands|mdy=y}}
| Elo max             = 208
| Elo max date        = 1998
| Elo min             = 222
| Elo min date        = March 2015
| American            = true
| pattern_la1         = _usvirgin24h
| pattern_b1          = _usvirgin24h
| pattern_ra1         = _usvirgin24h
| pattern_sh1         = _usvirgin24h
| leftarm1            = FFFFFF
| body1               = FFFFFF
| rightarm1           = FFFFFF
| shorts1             = FFFFFF
| socks1              = 0000FF
| pattern_la2         = _usvirgin24a
| pattern_b2          = _usvirgin24a
| pattern_ra2         = _usvirgin24a
| pattern_sh2         = _usvirgin24a
| leftarm2            = FFFFFF
| body2               = FFFFFF
| rightarm2           = FFFFFF
| shorts2             = FFFFFF
| socks2              = FFFF00
| First game          = {{nowrap|{{fb|VIR}} 1–0 {{fb-rt|VGB}}<br>([[U.S. Virgin Islands]]; March 21, 1998)}}
| Largest win         = ''Unofficial''<br>{{fb|MHL}} 0–4 {{fb-rt|VIR}}<br>([[Springdale, Arkansas|Springdale]], United States; August 14, 2025)<ref name=MarshallIslands>{{Cite web |title=Marshall Islands 0:4 United States Virgin Islands |url=https://globalsportsarchive.com/match/soccer/2025-08-15/marshall-islands-vs-us-virgin-islands/3839615/ |website=Global Sports Archive}}</ref><br>''Official''<br>{{fb|AIA}} 0–3 {{fb-rt|VIR}}<br>([[The Valley, Anguilla|The Valley]], Anguilla; March 22, 2019)<br>{{fb|VIR}} 5–2 {{fb-rt|ASA}}<br>([[Bayamón, Puerto Rico|Bayamón]], Puerto Rico; March 25, 2026)
| Largest loss        = {{nowrap|{{fb|LCA|1979}} 14–1 {{fb-rt|VIR}}}}<br>([[Port-au-Prince]], Haiti; April 14, 2001)
| World cup apps      =
| World cup first     =
| World cup best      =
| Regional name       = 
| Regional cup apps   = 
| Regional cup first  = 
| Regional cup best   = 
}}

The '''United States Virgin Islands national soccer team''' (officially recognized as '''US Virgin Islands''' by [[FIFA]]),<ref>https://inside.fifa.com/fifa-world-ranking/VIR?gender=men</ref> nicknamed ''The Dashing Eagles'', represents the [[United States Virgin Islands]] in men's international [[Association football|soccer]] and is controlled by the [[U.S. Virgin Islands Soccer Federation]].

==History==
Though FIFA did not officially recognize the USVI team as affiliated until 1992, the Virgin Islands federation was founded in the 1970s by Trinidad native Robert T. Wills who helped build the base of the USVI Soccer Federation as it is known today. The team played its first official international match on March 21, 1998, in a victory against the [[British Virgin Islands national football team|British Virgin Islands]].<ref name="US Virgin Islanders find a foothold">{{cite web|title=US Virgin Islanders find a foothold|url=https://www.fifa.com/worldranking/news/newsid=1490215/index.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20111015055430/http://www.fifa.com/worldranking/news/newsid=1490215/index.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=October 15, 2011|website=fifa.com|publisher=FIFA|access-date=February 20, 2012}}</ref> In May 2011, the USVI soccer federation chief, Frederick Hillaren, began ambitious changes in the team and appointed [[Keith Griffith]], former coach and captain of the [[Barbados national football team|Barbados national team]] and former coach of [[Trinidad and Tobago]] powerhouse club team [[Joe Public F.C.|Joe Public]], as technical director. Within two months of Griffith's appointment, the team shot up 51 places in the [[FIFA World Rankings]]. Soccer is the third most popular sport on the islands.<ref name="US Virgin Islanders find a foothold" />

=== 2026 FIFA Series ===
The [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|men's competition]] of the 2026 FIFA Series was split into nine different sections hosted across eight countries. In November 2025, FIFA announced that [[Puerto Rico national football team|Puerto Rico]] would host one such section in [[Bayamón, Puerto Rico|Bayamón]], in which [[Guam national football team|Guam]], the U.S. Virgin Islands and [[American Samoa national football team|American Samoa]] would also compete. The [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)#Puerto Rico|Puerto Rican section of the tournament]] was held in a four-match format (semi-finals, third-place match and final) in late March 2026. The U.S. Virgin Islands finished second in the section after losing to hosts Puerto Rico in the final.<ref name="2026 FIFA Series overview">{{cite web |author=<!-- not stated --> |date=March 3, 2026 |title=FIFA Series 2026: Everything you need to know |url=https://www.fifa.com/en/news/articles/fifa-series-everything-you-need-to-know |website=fifa.com |location= |publisher=[[FIFA]] |access-date=April 1, 2026}}</ref><ref name="2026 FIFA Series champions">{{cite web |author=<!-- not stated --> |date=March 29, 2026 |title=De Leon propels Puerto Rico to title |url=https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/series/articles/puerto-rico-champions-guam-finish-third |website=fifa.com |location= |publisher=[[FIFA]] |access-date=April 1, 2026}}</ref>

== Stadium ==
Previously the team did not have a [[national stadium]] and were forced to play their home matches at [[Lionel Roberts Park]], a baseball stadium in [[Charlotte Amalie, United States Virgin Islands|Charlotte Amalie]]. For their [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2014 FIFA World Cup qualification matches]], the team needed to bring in a new grass surface and make other special arrangements.<ref name="US Virgin Islanders find a foothold" /> In the past, the team has played at [[Paul E. Joseph Stadium]] in [[St. Croix, U.S. Virgin Islands|St. Croix]].<ref>{{cite web|last=Davis|first=Dave|title=V.I. Men's Soccer Team Trounced in World Cup Qualifier|url=http://stthomassource.com/content/news/local-sports/2011/09/07/vi-men-s-soccer-team-trounced-world-cup-qualifier|website=stthomassource.com|publisher=V.I. Source Publications, Inc.|date=September 7, 2011|access-date=February 21, 2012|archive-date=September 29, 2011|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110929165258/http://stthomassource.com/content/news/local-sports/2011/09/07/vi-men-s-soccer-team-trounced-world-cup-qualifier|url-status=live}}</ref> However, in February 2012, it was announced that the stadium was condemned and will be demolished to make way for a new sports complex that will cost at least $50&nbsp;million. The {{convert|50|acre|adj=on}} complex will contain venues for [[tennis]], [[volleyball]], [[baseball]], and [[Aquatic sports|aquatics]]. However, the plans did not include a new soccer stadium.<ref>{{cite web|last=Shatwell|first=Justin|title=Plans Unveiled for Frederiksted Sports Complex|url=http://stcroixsource.com/content/news/local-news/2012/02/16/plans-unveiled-frederiksted-sports-complex|publisher=V.I. Source Publications, Inc.|website=stcroixsource.com|date=February 16, 2012|access-date=February 21, 2012|archive-date=February 12, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150212142439/http://stcroixsource.com/content/news/local-news/2012/02/16/plans-unveiled-frederiksted-sports-complex|url-status=live}}</ref>

For the [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification]], the team played at the [[Addelita Cancryn Junior High School Ground]] where they suffered a 4–0 loss to the [[Barbados national football team|Barbados national team]].<ref name="USVI 0 Barbados 4">{{cite web|title=USVI 0 Barbados 4|url=https://www.fifa.com/worldcup/matches/round=274825/match=300310117/report.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150611022849/http://www.fifa.com/worldcup/matches/round=274825/match=300310117/report.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=June 11, 2015|website=fifa.com|publisher=FIFA|access-date=November 15, 2015}}</ref>

In August 2019, the USVI Soccer Association officially opened the 1,200-seat [[Bethlehem Soccer Stadium]] in [[Christiansted, U.S. Virgin Islands|Christiansted]] after an almost four-year construction process of the new complex.<ref name="FIFA and Concacaf Presidents">{{cite web |title=Sunday August 11 FIFA and Concacaf Presidents will be visiting the US Virgin Islands |url=https://www.facebook.com/permalink.php?story_fbid=2635101446552389&id=151228944939664&__xts__&#91;0&#93;=68.ARD6Q739mi5wlk357IzJp3S7rrmVcTNY-ZOezKGZ60wpnCInvhhMLy59gS0XNUPAptErUzertz3B8qMk8BdTfHWyrBqJNhZpzEzvigaSBoW2mUB5HeMgaYcxONEjIpjnLk5xJR7SJGr6eEp5or5ojbpc7VXbTo7j98Qb48CEkb8GfJjSUbtZHbZRV6JV2yYvTkeT_U0z6Oiv-r88jxIqbjbpc3-pZOIMkithCKN54y5OnBKASV5JpgAYIHbNeZZvBCuYqsy4REavXb4NGPJ-1ZWgD9e-81N0ENO5S35k26vRHjoLS9qZgMiyve6Wg1ugo_S4-WqlbjYKPOOdEZKM16Q2kA&__tn__=-R |publisher=United States Virgin Islands Soccer Association |access-date=August 10, 2019 |archive-date=July 20, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230720155731/https://www.facebook.com/login/?next=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpermalink.php%3Fstory_fbid%3D2635101446552389%26id%3D151228944939664%26__xts__%255B0%255D%3D68.ARD6Q739mi5wlk357IzJp3S7rrmVcTNY-ZOezKGZ60wpnCInvhhMLy59gS0XNUPAptErUzertz3B8qMk8BdTfHWyrBqJNhZpzEzvigaSBoW2mUB5HeMgaYcxONEjIpjnLk5xJR7SJGr6eEp5or5ojbpc7VXbTo7j98Qb48CEkb8GfJjSUbtZHbZRV6JV2yYvTkeT_U0z6Oiv-r88jxIqbjbpc3-pZOIMkithCKN54y5OnBKASV5JpgAYIHbNeZZvBCuYqsy4REavXb4NGPJ-1ZWgD9e-81N0ENO5S35k26vRHjoLS9qZgMiyve6Wg1ugo_S4-WqlbjYKPOOdEZKM16Q2kA%26__tn__%3D-R |url-status=live }}</ref><ref name="Aug. 11">{{cite web |title=USVI Soccer Association Invites Community to Masters Tournament on Aug. 11 |url=https://stcroixsource.com/2019/08/10/usvi-soccer-association-invites-community-to-masters-tournament-on-aug-11/ |publisher=St. Croix Source |access-date=August 10, 2019 |archive-date=August 10, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190810135722/https://stcroixsource.com/2019/08/10/usvi-soccer-association-invites-community-to-masters-tournament-on-aug-11/ |url-status=dead }}</ref>

==Results and fixtures==
{{Main|United States Virgin Islands national soccer team results}}

The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{football box collapsible
|round             = [[2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup]]
|date              = August 13
|time              = 7:00
|team1             = {{fb-rt|VIR}}
|score             = 1–1
|report            = 
|team2             = {{fb|TCA}}
|goals1            = 
*[[Carmelo Rodríguez|Rodríguez]] {{goal|40}}
|goals2            = 
*[[Junior Paul|Paul]] {{goal|21}}
|aet               = yes
|penaltyscore      = 5–4
|penalties1        =
|penalties2        = 
|stadium           = [[Springdale High School|Jarrell Williams Bulldog Stadium]]
|location          = [[Springdale, Arkansas]], [[United States]]
|attendance        = 
|referee           = 
|result            = D
}}
{{football box collapsible
|result=W|round             = [[2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup]]
|date              = August 14
|time              = 5:00
|team1             = {{fb-rt|MHL}}
|score             = 0–4
|report            = https://globalsportsarchive.com/match/soccer/2025-08-15/marshall-islands-vs-us-virgin-islands/3839615
|team2             = {{fb|VIR}}
|goals1            = 
|goals2            = 
*[[Rakeem Joseph]] {{goal|3||42|pen.||goal|61}}
*[[Gabriel Catone-Highfield]] {{goal|80}}
|stadium           = [[Springdale High School|Jarrell Williams Bulldog Stadium]]
|location          = [[Springdale, Arkansas]], [[United States]]
|attendance        = 
|referee           = 
}}
{{football box collapsible
|round             = [[exhibition match|Friendly]]
|date              = November 14
|time              = 
|team1             = {{fb-rt|GRN}}
|score             = 4–1
|report            = https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1DGgF4nxM5/?mibextid=wwXIfr
|team2             = {{fb|VIR}}
|goals1            = 
*[[Paris Muirhead|Muirhead]] {{goal|11}}
*[[Regan Charles-Cook|Charles-Cook]] {{goal|27||34}}
*[[Zade Douglas|Douglas]] {{goal|56}}
|goals2            = 
*[[Jannick Liburd|Liburd]] {{goal|71}}
|stadium           = [[Kirani James Athletic Stadium]]
|location          = [[St. George's, Grenada|St. George's]], [[Grenada]]
|attendance        = 
|referee           = 
|result            = L
}}
===2026===
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]]
|date       = March 25
|time       = {{UTZ|16:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|VIR}}
|score      = 5–2
|team2      = {{fb|ASA}}
|goals1     =
*[[Joshua Ramos|J. Ramos]] {{goal|7}}
*[[Toryn Penders|Penders]] {{goal|19||20}}
*[[Jannick Liburd|Liburd]] {{goal|53}}
*[[Brad Robinson (footballer)|Robinson]] {{sentoff|0|79}}
*[[Jimson St. Louis|St. Louis]] {{goal|90+2|pen.}}
|goals2     = [[Ali'i Mitchell|Mitchell]] {{goal|80|pen.|82}}
|stadium    = [[Juan Ramón Loubriel Stadium]]
|location   = [[Bayamón, Puerto Rico|Bayamón]], Puerto Rico
|attendance =
|referee    = [[José Torres (referee)|José Torres]] ([[Puerto Rican Football Federation|Puerto Rico]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-25/us-virgin-islands-vs-american-samoa/4103609
|result     = W
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]]
|date       = March 28
|time       = {{UTZ|20:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|PUR}} 
|score      = 2–0
|team2      = {{fb|VIR}}
|goals1     = *[[Jeremy de León|De León]] {{goal|19|pen.}}
*[[Andrew Shaffer (footballer)|Shaffer]] {{goal|44|o.g.}}
|goals2     =
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-29/puerto-rico-vs-us-virgin-islands/4103612
|stadium    = [[Juan Ramón Loubriel Stadium]]
|location   = [[Bayamón, Puerto Rico|Bayamón]], Puerto Rico
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Randy Encarnación]] ([[Dominican Football Federation|Dominican Republic]])
|result     = L
}}

== Coaching history ==

{{Div col|colwidth=25em}}
* {{flagicon|England}} Paul Inurie (2000)
* {{flagicon|Romania}} [[Glad Bugariu]] (2000–2002)
* {{flagicon|Dominican Republic}} Francisco Williams Ramírez (2003–2004)
* {{flagicon|United States Virgin Islands}} [[Carlton Freeman]] (2004–2008)
* {{flagicon|Canada}} [[Craig Martin (Canadian soccer)|Craig Martin]] (2010)
* {{flagicon|Barbados}} [[Keith Griffith]] (2011)<ref name="US Virgin Islanders find a foothold" />
* {{flagicon|United States Virgin Islands}} [[Terrence Jones (football manager)|Terrence Jones]] (2011)
* {{flagicon|United States Virgin Islands}} Leonard Appleton (2014)
* {{flagicon|Somalia}} [[Ahmed Mohamed Ahmed]] (2015–2017)
* {{flagicon|Canada}} [[Craig Martin (Canadian soccer)|Craig Martin]] (2017)
* {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[Marcelo Serrano]] (2017–2019)
* {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[Gilberto Damiano]] (2019–2024)
* {{flagicon|United States Virgin Islands}} [[Terrence Jones (football manager)|Terrence Jones]] (2024–)
{{div col end}}

=== Technical directors ===
* {{flagicon|Barbados}} [[Keith Griffith]] (2011–2013)
* {{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} Kenadall Walkes (2013–)<ref name=Helenites>{{cite web|title=Helenites are USVI Soccer Champions|url=http://www.virginislandsnewsonline.com/en/news/helenites-are-usvi-soccer-champions|website=virginislandsnewsonline.com|publisher=Virgin Islands News Online|date=February 28, 2015|access-date=December 8, 2015|archive-date=December 10, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151210212116/http://www.virginislandsnewsonline.com/en/news/helenites-are-usvi-soccer-champions|url-status=live}}</ref>

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players have been named to the squad for [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]] against [[American Samoa national football team|American Samoa]] and [[Puerto Rico national football team|Puerto Rico]] on 25 and 28 March 2026.<ref>{{cite instagram|postid=https://www.instagram.com/p/DWFKt7NEZuk/|user=usvsif|date=20 March 2026|title=Squad announcement}}</ref>

''Caps and goals updated on March 28, 2026, following the match against [[Puerto Rico national football team|Puerto Rico]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Dylan Ramos]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|8|6}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[Kamphaengphet FC]]|clubnat=THA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Whelan Joseph]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|10|8}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Eastern Illinois Panthers men's soccer|Eastern Illinois Panthers]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Terrence Jones Jr.]]|age={{Birth date and age|1991|12|20}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[LRVI FC|LRVI]]|clubnat=VIR}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jett Blaschka]]|age={{Birth date and age|1999|12|16}}|caps=29|goals=1|club=[[Free agent|Unattached]]|clubnat=}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Joshua Ramos]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|04|25}}|caps=21|goals=1|club=[[Tormenta FC|Tormenta]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Quinn Farrell]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|09|26}}|caps=15|goals=2|club=[[Louisiana State University at Eunice|LSU Eunice]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Carmelo Rodríguez]]|age={{Birth date and age|1992|12|19}}|caps=6|goals=1|club=[[Rovers FC (U.S. Virgin Islands)|Rovers]]|clubnat=VIR}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Alfred Harris (footballer)|Alfred Harris]]|age={{Birth date and age|1999|1|23}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Rovers FC (U.S. Virgin Islands)|Rovers]]|clubnat=VIR}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Brad Robinson (footballer)|Brad Robinson]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|8|30}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Leverstock Green F.C.|Leverstock Green]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ismail Nieves]]|age=|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Loyola Marymount Lions]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Quinn Scott]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Northwood Timberwolves]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Axel Bartsch]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|5|16}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[LRVI FC|LRVI]]|clubnat=VIR}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jair Whyte]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|6|4}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Merrimack Warriors]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Andrew Shaffer (soccer)|Andrew Shaffer]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|3|9}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Bowling Green Falcons|Bowling Green University]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jannick Liburd]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|9|26}}|caps=4|goals=2|club=[[Free agent|Unattached]]|clubnat=}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Aubin Atemazem]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|6|4}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[New Vibes SC|New Vibes]]|clubnat=VIR}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Devien Bell]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Wagiya SC|Wagiya]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jimson St. Louis]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|12|2}}|caps=23|goals=2|club=[[Lionsbridge FC]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Rakeem Joseph]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|5|23}}|caps=18|goals=2|club=[[Empire F.C.|Empire]]|clubnat=ATG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Naqwan Henry]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|11|16}}|caps=14|goals=1|club=[[Treasure Beach F.C.|Treasure Beach]]|clubnat=JAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Matthew Roth]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|8|14}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Coastal Rush Pensacola]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Ramesses McGuiness]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|1|6}}|caps=13|goals=1|club=[[Pittsburgh City United FC|Pittsburgh City United]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Gabriel Catone-Highfield]]|age=|caps=5|goals=1|club=[[Mount Olive Trojans]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Toryn Penders]]|age={{Birth date and age|2008|3|3}}|caps=1|goals=2|club=[[Orlando City SC|Orlando City Academy]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have also been called up to the United States Virgin Islands squad within the last twelve months.

{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ahad Shabazz-Henry]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|3|13}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Kean University]]|clubnat=USA|latest=[[2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[William Shaffer]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|7|5}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Helenites SC|Helenites]]|clubnat=VIR|latest=v. {{fb|GRN}}, 14 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Yannic Elizee]]|age={{Birth date and age|2009|1|30}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Helenites SC|Helenites]]|clubnat=VIR|latest=v. {{fb|GRN}}, 14 November 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Connor Bass]]|age={{Birth date and age|2009|4|4}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Queen City Mutiny FC|Queen City Mutiny]]|clubnat=USA|latest=[[2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
<sup>INJ</sup> Withdrew due to injury<br>
<sup>PRE</sup> Preliminary squad / standby<br>
<sup>RET</sup> Retired from the national team<br>
<sup>SUS</sup> Serving suspension<br>
<sup>WD</sup> Player withdrew from the squad due to non-injury issue.
{{nat fs end}}

== Records ==
{{updated|October 12, 2024}}<ref>{{cite web |title=US Virgin Islands |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/199/Us_Virgin_Islands.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with US Virgin Islands.''

===Most appearances===

[[File:Jett Blaschka.jpg|175px|right|thumb|[[Jett Blaschka]] is US Virgin Islands' most capped player with 26 appearances.]]

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! width=30px |Rank
! width=160px |Player
! width=50px |Caps
! width=50px |Goals
! width=100px |Career
|-
| 1 
| align="left" | '''[[Jett Blaschka]]'''
| 26
| 1
| 2018–present
|-
| 2
| align="left" | '''[[Jimson St. Louis]]'''
| 22
| 1
| 2019–present
|-
|rowspan=2| 3
| align=left| [[Dusty Good]]
| 21
| 0
| 2011–2021
|-
| align="left" | '''[[Kassall Greene]]'''
| 21
| 0
| 2016–present
|-
| 5
| align="left" | '''[[Lionel Brown (soccer)|Lionel Brown]]'''
| 20
| 0
| 2019–present
|-
| 6
| align="left" | [[MacDonald Taylor Jr.]]
| 19
| 1
| 2006–2022
|-
| rowspan=2|7
| align="left" | '''[[J.C. Mack]]'''
| 18
| 3
| 2018–present
|-
| align="left" | '''[[Joshua Ramos]]'''
| 18
| 0
| 2019–present
|-
| rowspan=2|9
| align="left" | '''[[Raejae Joseph]]'''
| 17
| 1
| 2018–present
|-
| align="left" | [[Dwayne Thomas]]
| 17
| 1
| 2002–2015
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===
[[File:JC Mack CONCACAF Nations League 2019.jpg |200px|right|thumb|[[J. C. Mack|JC Mack]] is US Virgin Islands' joint-top scorer with 3 goals.]]

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:160px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|rowspan=2|1
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Jamie Browne]]'''
|3
|12
|{{#expr:3/12 round 2}}
|2006–present
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[J. C. Mack]]'''
|3
|18
|{{#expr:3/18 round 2}}
|2018–present
|-
|rowspan=7|3
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Kevin Sheppard]]
|2
|2
|{{#expr:2/2 round 2}}
|2002
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Reid Klopp]]
|2
|5
|{{#expr:2/5 round 2}}
|2011
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Trevor Wrensford]]
|2
|6
|{{#expr:2/6 round 2}}
|2016–2019
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Bryce Pierre]]
|2
|8
|{{#expr:2/8 round 2}}
|2004–2019
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Aaron Dennis]]
|2
|9
|{{#expr:2/9 round 2}}
|2018–2019
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Quinn Farrell]]'''
|2
|12
|{{#expr:2/12 round 2}}
|2021–present
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Rakeem Joseph]]'''
|2
|16
|{{#expr:2/16 round 2}}
|2018–present
|-
|}

== Competitive record ==

=== FIFA World Cup ===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]]
!rowspan="13"|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]]
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|F|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|A|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|F|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|A|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
|colspan="8"| ''Not a FIFA member''
|colspan="6"| ''Not a FIFA member''
|-
|{{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
|colspan="8" rowspan="7"| ''Did not qualify''
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 1
| 14
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 11
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
| 1
| 0
| 0
| 1
| 0
| 10
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
| 8
| 2
| 0
| 6
| 6
| 41
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
| 2
| 1
| 0
| 1
| 1
| 4
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
| 4
| 0
| 0
| 4
| 0
| 15
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| 2
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 1
| 1
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
|colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=7 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total||–||{{Tooltip|0/8|Number of tournaments qualified for}}||–||–||–||–||–||–
!21
!3
!2
!16
!9
!96
|}

=== CONCACAF Gold Cup ===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[CONCACAF Gold Cup]] record
!width=1% rowspan="21"|
!colspan=6|[[CONCACAF Gold Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!Pld
!W
!D*
!L
!GF
!GA
!Pld
!W
!D
!L
!GF
!GA
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1991 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1991]] || colspan="8" rowspan="4" |''Did not enter''||colspan="6" rowspan="4" |''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|MEX}} [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]] 
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]] 
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]] 
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]] || colspan="8"|''Withdrew from qualification''||colspan="6"|''Withdrew from qualification''<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.insideworldfootball.com/gold-cup-2000/ | title=Gold Cup 2000 }}</ref>
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]] ||colspan="8" rowspan="4"|''Did not qualify''||3||0||0||3||2||37
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|MEX}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]||2||0||0||2||2||11
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]||3||0||1||2||1||22
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]||2||0||0||2||1||12
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]] || colspan="8" rowspan="3" |''Did not enter''|| colspan="6" rowspan="3"|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]] 
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]] 
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|CAN}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]] || colspan="8" rowspan="6" |''Did not qualify''||2||0||0||2||1||3
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]||2||1||0||1||3||3
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|CRC}}{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]||4||1||0||3||3||16 
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]||colspan="6"|''[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League]]''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|CAN}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]||colspan="6"|''[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League]]''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|CAN}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]||colspan="6"|''[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League]]''
|-
!'''Total'''||'''0 Titles'''||'''0/18'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''16'''||'''2'''||'''1'''||'''13'''||'''13'''||'''104'''
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan="20" |[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
! colspan="10" |League
! rowspan="7" |
! colspan="9" |Finals
|-
!Season
!Division
!Group
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
! width="35" |{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/relegation at end of season}}
!'''Finals'''
!'''Result'''
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019–20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group A|A]]
|6
|1
|0
|5
|3
|11
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]
| colspan="8" rowspan="4" |''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group A|A]]
|6
|1
|1
|4
|5
|10
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C|B]]
|4
|0
|1
|3
|5
|11
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group A|A]]
|4
|0
|1
|3
|4
|14
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
!Total
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!20
!2
!3
!15
!17
!46
!'''—'''
!'''Total'''
!'''0 Titles'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
|}

===Caribbean Cup ===
[[File:Lionel Roberts Park.jpg|thumb|right|[[Lionel Roberts Park]] was used as the USVI home stadium before construction of the [[Bethlehem Soccer Stadium]].]]
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[Caribbean Cup]] record
!!width=1% rowspan=28|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!Pld
!W
!D*
!L
!GF
!GA
!Pld
!W
!D*
!L
!GF
!GA
|-
|{{flagicon|BAR}} [[1989 Caribbean Cup|1989]] 
|colspan=8 rowspan=9|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=9|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1990 Caribbean Cup|1990]] 
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1992 Caribbean Cup|1992]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1993 Caribbean Cup|1993]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]]
|-
|{{flagicon|CAY}} {{flagicon|JAM}} [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1996 Caribbean Cup|1996]]
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} {{flagicon|SKN}} [[1997 Caribbean Cup|1997]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} {{flagicon|TRI}} [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]
|Colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|Colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]
|Colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|2
|0
|2
|2
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]]
|3
|0
|0
|3
|2
|37
|-
|{{flagicon|BRB}} [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]
|3
|0
|1
|2
|1
|22
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]
|3
|1
|0
|2
|4
|12
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2008 Caribbean Cup|2008]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=3|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2010 Caribbean Cup|2010]]
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} [[2012 Caribbean Cup|2012]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2014 Caribbean Cup|2014]]
|Colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|0
|2
|1
|3
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|3
|17
|-
!Total
!0 Titles
!0/19
!0
!0
!0
!0
!0
!0
!17
!2
!3
!12
!13
!93
|}

==Head-to-head record==
{{#lst:United States Virgin Islands national soccer team results|Record by opponent}}

== References ==
{{reflist}}

== External links ==
* {{official website}}

{{United States Virgin Islands national soccer team}}
{{Soccer in the United States Virgin Islands}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of the United States Virgin Islands}}

[[Category:United States Virgin Islands national soccer team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
